## Runtime.Indexers.IRecipesByIngredientConfig.usageType property

Filter by usage type. - 'primary': Only recipes where ingredient is primary - 'alternate': Only recipes where ingredient is alternate - 'any': Any usage Defaults to 'any'.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly usageType?: IngredientUsageType;
```
